ThumbnailLightbox

Stable

A full-screen modal for viewing marketing thumbnails at full resolution with metadata headers, download support, and keyboard navigation.

Overview

The ThumbnailLightbox is a modal overlay for previewing images at full resolution. It includes orientation and aspect ratio badges, dimension display, download button, and optional metadata footer showing generation date, model, and processing time.

Live Demo

Click the button to open the thumbnail lightbox.

Props

Prop Type Default Description
isOpen boolean - Controls visibility.
onClose () => void - Callback to close the lightbox.
imageUrl string - URL of the image to display.
orientation 'landscape' | 'portrait' - Image orientation badge.
aspectRatio '16:9' | '9:16' - Aspect ratio badge.
dimensions { width: number; height: number } - Image dimensions badge.
metadata { generatedAt?: string; model?: string; processingTime?: number } - Optional generation metadata footer.
className string - Additional CSS classes.

Usage

thumbnail-lightbox-basic.tsx 
import { ThumbnailLightbox, Button } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function ThumbnailViewer() {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = React.useState(false);

  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}>View Thumbnail</Button>
      <ThumbnailLightbox
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
        imageUrl="https://example.com/thumbnail.jpg"
        orientation="landscape"
        aspectRatio="16:9"
      />
    </>
  );
}

Edge Cases

Closed State

When isOpen is false, the component returns null — nothing is rendered in the DOM.

Escape Key

Pressing Escape closes the lightbox. Event listener is scoped to only fire when isOpen is true.

Body Scroll Lock

Body overflow is set to 'hidden' when open and restored on close or unmount.

Backdrop Click

Clicking the backdrop overlay closes the lightbox. The image container prevents propagation.

Interactive Preview
